description_it: Migliora le tue competenze di livello C1 con frasi complete ed esempi d'uso quotidiano.

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Raramente ho visto un tramonto così bello."
exercises.correct_answer: Seldom have I seen such a beautiful sunset.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Avendo finito il suo lavoro, andò a casa.. Completa la frase in inglese: ___ his work, he went home.
exercises.correct_answer: Having finished
options: Having finished
Finished
Finishing
Have finished

exercises.prompt_it: Qual è la traduzione esatta per: "È essenziale che tu partecipi alla riunione."?
options: It is trivial that you attend the meeting.
It is optional that you attend the meeting.
It is unnecessary that you attend the meeting.
It is quintessential that you attend the meeting.
exercises.correct_answer: It is quintessential that you attend the meeting.
exercises.explanation_it: L'unica forma corretta e naturale è: "It is quintessential that you attend the meeting.".

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Mitiga i rischi pianificando in anticipo."
exercises.correct_answer: He mitigates the risks by planning ahead.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Se non fosse stato per il tuo aiuto, avrei fallito.. Completa la frase in inglese: ___ your help, I would have failed.
exercises.correct_answer: But for
options: But for
Unless
Without
Except

exercises.prompt_it: Qual è la traduzione esatta per: "Non solo è intelligente, ma è anche gran lavoratrice."?
options: Not only is she smart, but she is also hardworking.
Not only she is smart, but she is also hardworking.
Not only she was smart, but she is also hardworking.
Not only was she smart, but she is also hardworking.
exercises.correct_answer: Not only is she smart, but she is also hardworking.
exercises.explanation_it: L'unica forma corretta e naturale è: "Not only is she smart, but she is also hardworking.".

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Non appena sono arrivato, ha iniziato a diluviare."
exercises.correct_answer: No sooner had I arrived than it started pouring.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Se mi fossi reso conto del pericolo, non sarei andato.. Completa la frase in inglese: ___ I realized the danger, I wouldn't have gone.
exercises.correct_answer: Had
options: Were
Should
Had
If

exercises.audio_text: Seldom have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
exercises.prompt_it: Trascrivi esattamente la frase in inglese che hai sentito.
options: Seldom did I see such a beautiful sunset.
Seldom I have seen such a beautiful sunset.
Seldom have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
exercises.correct_answer: Seldom have I seen such a beautiful sunset.

exercises.audio_text: Having finished his work, he went home.
